name: Aryan Khokhar
title: Marketing Analyst
tagline: Marketing Analyst with nearly 4 years of experience supporting campaign performance, customer engagement, and marketing reporting across digital marketing initiatives. Experienced in using SQL, Tableau, Power BI, and Google Analytics to analyze campaign data, monitor KPIs, and support data-driven marketing decisions. Contributed to improving conversion rates, campaign engagement, and reporting efficiency through campaign analysis, audience segmentation, A/B testing, and performance tracking. Strong understanding of digital marketing metrics, campaign optimization, and cross-functional collaboration, with a focus on delivering actionable insights that support business and marketing goals.
